extName.message: DeBait – Vijipicha halisi vya YouTube, bila clickbait
extName.description: Extension name / store title (shown in browser and store).

extDescription.message: Hubadilisha kiotomatiki vijipicha vya clickbait vya YouTube na fremu halisi ya kwanza ya video. Nyepesi, faragha, bila usanidi.
extDescription.description: Short description (manifest; Chrome caps at 132 chars).
